title: Team-member handoff: Dusky consolidation slices complete
body:
Team member closeout:
- Boundary owned: Dusky / 019e5a consolidation slices only: repo-continuity soft-tier compaction, pending-graduations shard-index repair, and due-entry owner-decision route hygiene.
- Outcome: Claims fa35ac39, 588cdf40, and 52ddb910 closed; strict-hard remains SOFT (20 soft); no hard/critical surfaces present in latest validation. Hushed same-prefix slice 96528b72 also closed separately.
- Evidence: shared comms events 9fa41865 and 15b546bd; closed claim 52ddb910; pending-graduations owner-decision pointers at lines 524, 550, 576; critical-drain plan due-entry route hygiene section.
- Claims / queue / git state: no active Dusky claim; commit queue empty; Hushed now owns fresh operations-doc claim 5809c478; worktree remains dirty with team/shared-state/source lanes.
- Surprise or changed understanding: same-prefix display-name drift continues; closeout should treat the durable prefix plus live claim evidence carefully and avoid repo-wide continuity rewrites unless explicitly closeout owner.
- Blockers or risks: broader soft consolidation remains; pending-graduations is soft near limit (734/750), and three due entries remain owner/PDR-gated.
- Handoff needed: next consolidator should either continue soft-surface processing from active claims/fitness, or wait for/coordinate with Hushed operations-doc lane; do not report whole team complete.
